uploadData.title: Upload Data
uploadData.description: Upload sensor data files to your experiment for analysis.
uploadData.zipFileDescription: Upload a .zip file containing your sensor data. Maximum file size: 100MB.
uploadData.successDescription: Your data has been uploaded and queued for processing.
uploadData.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please upload a .zip file.
uploadData.missingRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.
uploadData.genericError: An error occurred while uploading your file. Please try again.
